name: Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation
summary: Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation operates as an information technology (IT) service provider to Fortune 500 companies worldwide. It provides R&D as a service, which include talents outsourcing consultancy, research and production service, and team building service; software development, testing, and operation and maintenance services; and business process outsourcing services. The company also offers product globalization services; and software localization, localization testing, translation, and desktop publishing services. In addition, it provides cloud service, mobile, mobile payment, enterprise resource planning, and SmartRobot solutions; data warehousing/big data implementation and consulting, and Internet advertising data analysis services; application management services. The company serves banking, insurance, telecom, automobile, healthcare, retail, and manufacturing industries. Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation was founded in 1992 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
